name: BRB Foods Inc.
business: BRB Foods Inc. sells dry food products under licensed brands (primarily Knorr) to wholesalers, supermarkets, and retail chains in Brazil through a B2B2C model. The company has temporarily suspended revenue-generating activities since Q2 2024 to focus on operational readiness. Its sole remaining license agreement with Unilever for the Knorr brand expires on June 30, 2026.

exposures.sentence: Our business includes acquiring, producing, processing, manufacturing and packaging dry food products that are distributed to, and marketed at, major retailers and food service establishments throughout Brazil.

catalysts.sentence: We currently expect the 15 products supported under the Knorr license agreement to be launched during 2026, subject to capital availability and completion of our commercialization plan.
The Knorr license agreement (Unilever IP Holdings B.V.): license agreement expires on June 30, 2026, covering 15 products.
